settings.editor: Extraordinary oceanfront property in Montauk offering the ultimate in privacy. Spanning over 36 acres of private reserve was based on a Chinese tea house with its Asian influenced blue tiled roof.

By far the most private site in the Hamptons, this stylish and ultra-modern residence offers wooded hills and nature paths through private reserve leading to pristine ocean beaches, and is sited high on a bluff to capture commanding views of the Atlantic Ocean. A gated private driveway meanders through the private and scenic reserve leading to an incredible three level 7,000 square foot modernist retreat with every amenity for the most discerning buyer.

settings.editor: Thanks to interpersonal skills, Henry Miller has great relations with both company clients and potential customers. Customer focused and honest real estate agent. Intelligent, ambitious, energetic and proactive perfectionist. Working with Henry is a signature of success.
